title: Present Government Grievous.
content:
Men are suspicious, prone to discontent:
    Subjects still loathe the present government.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Present Government Grievous.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
